anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution is available at /repo after `git apply` from solve.sh. The agent could potentially read the solution patch or the test file itself (tests/test_outputs.py) to reverse-engineer the exact expected structure. Since tests only do AST analysis, an agent could craft code that satisfies the AST checks without understanding the actual performance bug.
